1: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
2: // MODULE: Causal Boost
3: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
4: // Feature catalog: Causal neighbor boost and injection
5: // Graph-traversal score boosting via causal edge relationships.
6: // Walks the causal_edges graph up to MAX_HOPS, amplifying scores
7: // For results related to top seed results via weighted CTE.
8: //
9: // Sparse-First + Intent-Aware Traversal:
10: // - Sparse-first policy — density < 0.5 disables community
11: //   detection and constrains traversal to typed 1-hop expansion only.
12: // - Intent-aware edge traversal — maps classified query intents
13: //   to edge-type priority orderings; computes traversal score as:
14: //   score = seedScore * edgePrior * hopDecay * freshness
15: // Both requirements are gated behind SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL (default ON, graduated).
16: import { isCausalBoostEnabled, isTypedTraversalEnabled as _isTypedTraversalEnabled, isGraphContextInjectionEnabled } from './search-flags.js';
17: import { routeQueryConcepts } from './entity-linker.js';
18: 
19: import type Database from 'better-sqlite3';
20: 
21: /** Maximum graph traversal depth. Beyond 2 hops, signal degrades and queries become expensive. */
22: const MAX_HOPS = 2;
23: /** Per-hop boost cap. 0.05 keeps causal nudge subtle relative to semantic scores (~0.5–1.0). */
24: const MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP = 0.05;
25: /** Combined causal + session boost ceiling to prevent runaway amplification. */
26: const MAX_COMBINED_BOOST = 0.20;
27: /** Top fraction of result set used as graph walk seed nodes. */
28: const SEED_FRACTION = 0.25;
29: /** Absolute cap on seed nodes regardless of result set size. */
30: const MAX_SEED_RESULTS = 5;
31: 
32: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
33: // SPARSE-FIRST POLICY CONSTANTS
34: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
35: /** Graph density threshold below which community detection is disabled
36:  * and traversal is constrained to typed 1-hop expansion only.
37:  * Density = edgeCount / totalMemories (see edge-density.ts). */
38: const SPARSE_DENSITY_THRESHOLD = 0.5;
39: 
40: /** Traversal depth used in sparse mode (1-hop typed expansion). */
41: const SPARSE_MAX_HOPS = 1;
42: 
43: /** Default traversal depth for typed traversal helper policies. */
44: const DEFAULT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL_DEPTH = SPARSE_MAX_HOPS;
45: 
46: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
47: // INTENT-AWARE EDGE TRAVERSAL
48: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
49: /** Per-hop decay factor applied to traversal score. 1-hop = 1.0, 2-hop = 0.5. */
50: const HOP_DECAY_BASE = 1.0;
51: 
52: /**
53:  * Intent-to-edge-type priority ordering.
54:  * Maps each query intent to an ordered list of edge relation types.
55:  * Earlier entries in the list receive higher edge prior scores.
56:  *
57:  * Scores are normalized: first-listed relation = 1.0, second = 0.75, remaining = 0.5.
58:  */
59: const INTENT_EDGE_PRIORITY: Record<string, string[]> = {
60:   fix_bug:        ['CORRECTION', 'DEPENDS_ON', 'supersedes', 'caused'],
61:   add_feature:    ['EXTENDS', 'DEPENDS_ON', 'enabled', 'derived_from'],
62:   find_decision:  ['PREFERENCE', 'CORRECTION', 'supersedes', 'contradicts'],
63:   // Defaults for other intents — use existing relation-weight ordering
64:   understand:     ['caused', 'enabled', 'derived_from', 'supports', 'supersedes', 'contradicts'],
65:   find_spec:      ['caused', 'enabled', 'derived_from', 'supports', 'supersedes', 'contradicts'],
66:   refactor:       ['caused', 'derived_from', 'enabled', 'supports', 'supersedes', 'contradicts'],
67:   security_audit: ['caused', 'contradicts', 'supersedes', 'enabled', 'supports', 'derived_from'],
68: };
69: 
70: /** Fallback priority list when intent is unrecognized. */
71: const DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIORITY = ['caused', 'enabled', 'derived_from', 'supports', 'supersedes', 'contradicts'];
72: 
73: /** Edge prior score tiers: 1st priority = 1.0, 2nd = 0.75, remaining = 0.5. */
74: const EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS = [1.0, 0.75, 0.5];
75: const DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIOR = 1.0;
76: const FRESHNESS_DECAY_WINDOW_MS = 30 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
77: 
78: /**
79:  * Relation-type weight multipliers for causal edge traversal.
80:  * Applied during CTE accumulation so stronger relation types (supersedes)
81:  * amplify the boost while weaker ones (contradicts) attenuate it.
82:  *
83:  * These multipliers serve a DIFFERENT purpose from RELATION_WEIGHTS in
84:  * causal-edges.ts. causal-edges weights are applied during chain traversal
85:  * scoring (getCausalChain), while these are applied during the causal-boost
86:  * CTE walk (getNeighborBoosts) for search result amplification. The value
87:  * ranges overlap but are tuned independently for their respective contexts:
88:  *   - causal-edges: traversal strength propagation (range 0.8–1.5)
89:  *   - causal-boost: search result boost amplitude (range 0.8–1.5)
90:  */
91: const RELATION_WEIGHT_MULTIPLIERS: Record<string, number> = {
92:   supersedes: 1.5,
93:   contradicts: 0.8,
94:   caused: 1.0,
95:   enabled: 1.0,
96:   derived_from: 1.0,
97:   supports: 1.0,
98: };
99: 
100: interface RankedSearchResult extends Record<string, unknown> {
101:   id: number;
102:   score?: number;
103:   rrfScore?: number;
104:   intentAdjustedScore?: number;
105:   attentionScore?: number;
106:   similarity?: number;
107:   sessionBoost?: number;
108:   baseScore?: number;
109:   causalBoost?: number;
110:   injectedByCausalBoost?: boolean;
111: }
112: 
113: interface CausalBoostMetadata {
114:   enabled: boolean;
115:   applied: boolean;
116:   boostedCount: number;
117:   injectedCount: number;
118:   maxBoostApplied: number;
119:   traversalDepth: number;
120:   /** True when sparse-first policy was active (density < threshold) */
121:   sparseModeActive?: boolean;
122:   /** Intent used for edge traversal scoring (if typed traversal enabled) */
123:   intentUsed?: string;
124: }
125: 
126: /** Options for applyCausalBoost — extended with sparse-first parameters. */
127: interface CausalBoostOptions {
128:   /** Graph density (edgeCount / totalMemories). Used for sparse-first gate. */
129:   graphDensity?: number;
130:   /** Classified query intent. Used for intent-aware edge priority mapping. */
131:   intent?: string;
132:   /** Freshness factor [0,1] applied to traversal scoring. Defaults to 1.0. */
133:   freshness?: number;
134: }

136: interface NeighborBoost {
137:   boost: number;
138:   hopCount: number;
139: }

144:  * Check whether the causal boost feature flag is enabled.
145:  * Default: ON (graduated). Set SPECKIT_CAUSAL_BOOST=false to disable.
146:  * When enabled, causal graph traversal amplifies scores for results
147:  * connected to top-ranked results via causal edges.
148:  *
149:  * Delegates to the canonical flag check in search-flags.ts.

153: }

155: /**
156:  * Check whether the typed traversal feature flag is enabled.
157:  * Default: ON (graduated). Set SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL=false to disable.
158:  * Activates sparse-first + intent-aware traversal.
159:  */
160: function isTypedTraversalEnabled(): boolean {

169: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
170: // SPARSE-FIRST POLICY
171: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
172: 
173: /**
174:  * Determine whether sparse mode should be active for this traversal pass.
175:  * Sparse mode is active when:
176:  *   - SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL is enabled, AND
177:  *   - graphDensity is a finite number below SPARSE_DENSITY_THRESHOLD (0.5)
178:  *
179:  * When sparse mode is active:
180:  *   - Community detection is suppressed (caller must respect this)
181:  *   - Traversal is constrained to SPARSE_MAX_HOPS (1)
182:  */
183: function isSparseMode(graphDensity: number | undefined): boolean {
184:   if (!isTypedTraversalEnabled()) return false;
185:   if (typeof graphDensity !== 'number' || !Number.isFinite(graphDensity)) return false;
186:   return graphDensity < SPARSE_DENSITY_THRESHOLD;
187: }
188: 
189: interface SparseFirstTraversalPolicy {
190:   sparseModeActive: boolean;
191:   communityDetectionEnabled: boolean;
192: }
193: 
194: /**
195:  * Resolve the sparse-first policy gate for callers that need a simple
196:  * community-detection decision without running the full boost pipeline.
197:  */
198: function resolveSparseFirstTraversalPolicy(graphDensity: number | undefined): SparseFirstTraversalPolicy {
199:   const sparseModeActive = isSparseMode(graphDensity);
200:   return {
201:     sparseModeActive,
202:     communityDetectionEnabled: !sparseModeActive,
203:   };
204: }
205: 
206: /**
207:  * Resolve traversal depth for typed traversal helper callers.
208:  * Typed traversal defaults to 1-hop and stays within the supported range.
209:  * When the flag is off, preserve the legacy MAX_HOPS behavior.
210:  */
211: function resolveTraversalDepth(depth: number = DEFAULT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL_DEPTH): number {
212:   if (!isTypedTraversalEnabled()) {
213:     return MAX_HOPS;
214:   }
215: 
216:   if (!Number.isFinite(depth)) {
217:     return DEFAULT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL_DEPTH;
218:   }
219: 
220:   return Math.max(DEFAULT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL_DEPTH, Math.min(MAX_HOPS, Math.trunc(depth)));
221: }
222: 
223: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
224: // INTENT-AWARE EDGE TRAVERSAL HELPERS
225: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
226: 
227: /**
228:  * Compute the edge prior score for a given relation type and intent.
229:  * Returns a normalized score in [0.5, 1.0] based on priority position.
230:  *
231:  * Canonical relation names from causal-boost are lower-cased (e.g. 'supersedes').
232:  * Intent priority lists may include upper-case semantic labels (e.g. 'CORRECTION').
233:  * Matching is case-insensitive against both the label and any alias.
234:  *
235:  * Alias map: CORRECTION → supersedes | contradicts
236:  *            DEPENDS_ON → caused | enabled | derived_from
237:  *            EXTENDS    → enabled | derived_from
238:  *            PREFERENCE → supports
239:  */
240: const EDGE_LABEL_ALIASES: Record<string, string[]> = {
241:   CORRECTION:  ['supersedes', 'contradicts'],
242:   DEPENDS_ON:  ['caused', 'enabled', 'derived_from'],
243:   EXTENDS:     ['enabled', 'derived_from'],
244:   PREFERENCE:  ['supports'],
245: };
246: 
247: function resolveEdgePrior(relation: string, intent: string): number {
248:   if (!isTypedTraversalEnabled()) return 1.0;
249: 
250:   const priority = INTENT_EDGE_PRIORITY[intent] ?? DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIORITY;
251:   const relLower = relation.toLowerCase();
252: 
253:   for (let i = 0; i < priority.length; i++) {
254:     const entry = priority[i];
255:     if (!entry) continue;
256:     // Exact match (case-insensitive)
257:     if (entry.toLowerCase() === relLower) {
258:       return EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS[Math.min(i, EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS.length - 1)] ?? 0.5;
259:     }
260:     // Alias expansion: check if this priority label maps to the relation
261:     const aliases = EDGE_LABEL_ALIASES[entry.toUpperCase()];
262:     if (aliases && aliases.includes(relLower)) {
263:       return EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS[Math.min(i, EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS.length - 1)] ?? 0.5;
264:     }
265:   }
266: 
267:   // Relation not found in priority list — assign minimum tier
268:   return EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS[EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS.length - 1] ?? 0.5;
269: }
270: 
271: /**
272:  * Compute hop decay factor. Formula: HOP_DECAY_BASE / hopDistance.
273:  * 1-hop → 1.0, 2-hop → 0.5, etc. Capped at 1.0.
274:  */
275: function computeHopDecay(hopDistance: number): number {
276:   if (!Number.isFinite(hopDistance) || hopDistance <= 0) return 0;
277:   return Math.min(1.0, HOP_DECAY_BASE / hopDistance);
278: }
279: 
280: /**
281:  * Compute the intent-aware traversal score.
282:  * Formula: seedScore * edgePrior * hopDecay * freshness
283:  *
284:  * @param seedScore  - Base score of the seed node (0–1)
285:  * @param relation   - Edge relation type (e.g. 'supersedes', 'caused')
286:  * @param hopDistance - Hop distance from seed (1 = direct neighbor)
287:  * @param freshness  - Recency factor (0–1, default 1.0)
288:  * @param intent     - Classified query intent (default 'understand')
289:  */
290: function computeIntentTraversalScore(
291:   seedScore: number,
292:   relation: string,
293:   hopDistance: number,
294:   freshness: number,
295:   intent: string
296: ): number {
297:   const edgePrior = resolveEdgePrior(relation, intent);
298:   const hopDecay = computeHopDecay(hopDistance);
299:   return seedScore * edgePrior * hopDecay * freshness;
300: }
301: 
302: function getIntentEdgePriorities(intent: string): string[] {
303:   return (INTENT_EDGE_PRIORITY[intent] ?? []).slice(0, 2);
304: }
305: 
306: function computeIntentEdgePrior(intent: string, edgeType: string): number {
307:   const priorities = getIntentEdgePriorities(intent);
308:   if (priorities.length === 0) {
309:     return DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIOR;
310:   }
311: 
312:   const normalizedEdgeType = edgeType.toUpperCase();
313:   const directMatchIndex = priorities.findIndex(
314:     (priority) => priority.toUpperCase() === normalizedEdgeType,
315:   );
316:   if (directMatchIndex >= 0) {
317:     return EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS[Math.min(directMatchIndex, EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS.length - 1)] ?? 0.5;
318:   }
319: 
320:   return resolveEdgePrior(edgeType, intent);
321: }
322: 
323: function computeTraversalHopDecay(hopDistance: number): number {
324:   return computeHopDecay(hopDistance);
325: }
326: 
327: function computeTraversalFreshnessFactor(
328:   updatedAt: Date | string,
329:   now: Date | string = new Date(),
330: ): number {
331:   const updatedAtMs = new Date(updatedAt).getTime();
332:   const nowMs = new Date(now).getTime();
333:   if (!Number.isFinite(updatedAtMs) || !Number.isFinite(nowMs) || nowMs <= updatedAtMs) {
334:     return 1;
335:   }
336: 
337:   const ageMs = nowMs - updatedAtMs;
338:   return Math.exp(-(ageMs / FRESHNESS_DECAY_WINDOW_MS));
339: }
340: 
341: function computeIntentAwareTraversalScore(params: {
342:   seedScore: number;
343:   intent: string;
344:   edgeType: string;
345:   hopDistance: number;
346:   updatedAt: Date | string;
347:   now?: Date | string;
348: }): number {
349:   return params.seedScore *
350:     computeIntentEdgePrior(params.intent, params.edgeType) *
351:     computeTraversalHopDecay(params.hopDistance) *
352:     computeTraversalFreshnessFactor(params.updatedAt, params.now);
353: }
354: 
355: /**
356:  * Resolve the primary numeric score from a result, checking score, rrfScore,
357:  * and similarity (normalized to 0–1) in precedence order. Returns 0 if none present.
358:  */
359: function resolveBaseScore(result: RankedSearchResult): number {
360:   if (typeof result.score === 'number' && Number.isFinite(result.score)) return result.score;
361:   if (typeof result.rrfScore === 'number' && Number.isFinite(result.rrfScore)) return result.rrfScore;
362:   if (typeof result.similarity === 'number' && Number.isFinite(result.similarity)) return result.similarity / 100;
363:   return 0;
364: }
365: 
366: function buildPipelineRow(
367:   row: RankedSearchResult,
368:   baseScore: number,
369:   causalBoost: number
370: ): RankedSearchResult {
371:   const allowedBoost = Math.max(0, Math.min(causalBoost, MAX_COMBINED_BOOST));
372:   const score = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, baseScore * (1 + allowedBoost)));
373:   return {
374:     ...row,
375:     score,
376:     rrfScore: score,
377:     intentAdjustedScore: score,
378:     attentionScore: score,
379:     causalBoost: allowedBoost,
380:     baseScore,
381:     injectedByCausalBoost: true,
382:   };
383: }
384: 
385: /**
386:  * Deduplicate and validate a list of numeric IDs, truncating to integers
387:  * and dropping non-finite values to guard against DB query injection.
388:  */
389: function normalizeIds(inputIds: number[]): number[] {
390:   const ids = new Set<number>();
391:   for (const candidate of inputIds) {
392:     if (typeof candidate === 'number' && Number.isFinite(candidate)) {
393:       ids.add(Math.trunc(candidate));
394:     }
395:   }
396:   return Array.from(ids);
397: }
398: 
399: /**
400:  * Compute the hop-distance decay boost: MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP / hopDistance,
401:  * capped at MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP so closer neighbors get the full signal.
402:  */
403: function computeBoostByHop(hopDistance: number): number {
404:   if (!Number.isFinite(hopDistance) || hopDistance <= 0) return 0;
405:   const rawBoost = MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP / hopDistance;
406:   return Math.min(MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP, rawBoost);
407: }
408: 
409: /**
410:  * Walk causal edges up to maxHops from the given seed memory IDs,
411:  * returning a map of neighbor ID to boost score.
412:  *
413:    * Accepts an optional maxHops override. When sparse mode is active
414:  * (density < 0.5 and SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL enabled), the caller passes
415:  * SPARSE_MAX_HOPS (1) to constrain traversal depth.
416:  */
417: function getNeighborBoosts(memoryIds: number[], maxHops: number = MAX_HOPS): Map<number, NeighborBoost> {
418:   const neighborBoosts = new Map<number, NeighborBoost>();
419:   if (!db) return neighborBoosts;
420: 
421:   const ids = normalizeIds(memoryIds);
422:   if (ids.length === 0) return neighborBoosts;
423: 
424:   const originIds = ids.map((value) => String(value));
425:   const placeholders = originIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
426: 
427:   // Relation-weighted CTE — accumulates score with multiplier
428:   // Based on edge relation type and edge strength column.
429:   // 'supersedes' edges get 1.5x, 'contradicts' 0.8x, others 1.0x.
430:   const query = `
431:     WITH RECURSIVE causal_walk(origin_id, node_id, hop_distance, walk_score) AS (
432:       SELECT ce.source_id, ce.target_id, 1,
433:              (CASE WHEN ce.relation = 'supersedes' THEN 1.5
434:                    WHEN ce.relation = 'contradicts' THEN 0.8
435:                    ELSE 1.0 END * COALESCE(ce.strength, 1.0))
436:       FROM causal_edges ce
437:       WHERE ce.source_id IN (${placeholders})
438: 
439:       UNION
440: 
441:       SELECT ce.target_id, ce.source_id, 1,
442:              (CASE WHEN ce.relation = 'supersedes' THEN 1.5
443:                    WHEN ce.relation = 'contradicts' THEN 0.8
444:                    ELSE 1.0 END * COALESCE(ce.strength, 1.0))
445:       FROM causal_edges ce
446:       WHERE ce.target_id IN (${placeholders})
447: 
448:       UNION
449: 
450:       SELECT cw.origin_id,
451:              CASE
452:                WHEN ce.source_id = cw.node_id THEN ce.target_id
453:                ELSE ce.source_id
454:              END,
455:              cw.hop_distance + 1,
456:              (cw.walk_score * CASE WHEN ce.relation = 'supersedes' THEN 1.5
457:                                    WHEN ce.relation = 'contradicts' THEN 0.8
458:                                    ELSE 1.0 END * COALESCE(ce.strength, 1.0))
459:       FROM causal_walk cw
460:       JOIN causal_edges ce
461:         ON ce.source_id = cw.node_id OR ce.target_id = cw.node_id
462:       WHERE cw.hop_distance < ?
463:         AND (CASE WHEN ce.source_id = cw.node_id THEN ce.target_id ELSE ce.source_id END) != cw.origin_id
464:     )
465:     SELECT node_id, MIN(hop_distance) AS min_hop, MAX(walk_score) AS max_walk_score
466:     FROM causal_walk
467:     WHERE node_id NOT IN (${placeholders})
468:     GROUP BY node_id
469:   `;
470: 
471:   try {
472:     const rows = (db.prepare(query) as Database.Statement).all(
473:       ...originIds,
474:       ...originIds,
475:       maxHops,
476:       ...originIds
477:     ) as Array<{ node_id: string; min_hop: number; max_walk_score: number }>;
478: 
479:     for (const row of rows) {
480:       const neighborId = Number.parseInt(row.node_id, 10);
481:       if (!Number.isFinite(neighborId)) continue;
482:       // Combine hop-distance decay with relation-weighted walk score
483:       const hopBoost = computeBoostByHop(row.min_hop);
484:       const walkMultiplier = typeof row.max_walk_score === 'number' && Number.isFinite(row.max_walk_score)
485:         ? Math.max(0.1, Math.min(2.0, row.max_walk_score))
486:         : 1.0;
487:       const boost = hopBoost * walkMultiplier;
488:       if (boost <= 0) continue;
489:       const current = neighborBoosts.get(neighborId);
490:       if (!current || boost > current.boost) {
491:         neighborBoosts.set(neighborId, {
492:           boost,
493:           hopCount: Math.max(1, Math.min(maxHops, row.min_hop)),
494:         });
495:       }
496:     }
497:   } catch (error: unknown) {
498:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
499:     console.warn(`[causal-boost] Traversal failed: ${message}`);
500:   }
501: 
502:   return neighborBoosts;
503: }
504: 
505: function fetchNeighborRows(memoryIds: number[]): RankedSearchResult[] {
506:   if (!db || memoryIds.length === 0) return [];
507: 
508:   const placeholders = memoryIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
509:   const rows = (db.prepare(`
510:     SELECT id, spec_folder, file_path, title, importance_tier, trigger_phrases, created_at
511:     FROM memory_index
512:     WHERE id IN (${placeholders})
513:   `) as Database.Statement).all(...memoryIds) as RankedSearchResult[];
514: 
515:   return rows;
516: }
517: 
518: /**
519:  * Apply causal graph boost to ranked search results, injecting
520:  * graph-discovered neighbors and amplifying scores for connected nodes.
521:  *
522:    * Sparse-first and intent-aware traversal extensions:
523:    * - When SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL is enabled and graphDensity < 0.5,
524:  *   activates sparse mode: traversal depth = 1, community detection suppressed.
525:    * - When SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL is enabled and intent is provided,
526:  *   applies intent-aware edge traversal scoring using the formula:
527:  *   score = seedScore * edgePrior * hopDecay * freshness
528:  *
529:  * @param results - Ranked search results from prior pipeline stages
530:    * @param options - Optional traversal parameters (graphDensity, intent, freshness)
531:  */
532: function applyCausalBoost(
533:   results: RankedSearchResult[],
534:   options: CausalBoostOptions = {}
535: ): { results: RankedSearchResult[]; metadata: CausalBoostMetadata } {
536:   const { graphDensity, intent = 'understand', freshness = 1.0 } = options;
537: 
538:   // Determine sparse mode and effective hop depth.
539:   const sparseMode = isSparseMode(graphDensity);
540:   const effectiveMaxHops = sparseMode ? SPARSE_MAX_HOPS : MAX_HOPS;
541: 
542:   const metadata: CausalBoostMetadata = {
543:     enabled: isEnabled(),
544:     applied: false,
545:     boostedCount: 0,
546:     injectedCount: 0,
547:     maxBoostApplied: 0,
548:     traversalDepth: effectiveMaxHops,
549:     sparseModeActive: sparseMode,
550:     intentUsed: isTypedTraversalEnabled() ? intent : undefined,
551:   };
552: 
553:   if (!metadata.enabled || !Array.isArray(results) || results.length === 0 || !db) {
554:     return { results, metadata };
555:   }
556: 
557:   const seedLimit = Math.max(1, Math.min(MAX_SEED_RESULTS, Math.ceil(results.length * SEED_FRACTION)));
558:   const seedResults = results.slice(0, seedLimit);
559:   const seedIds = seedResults.map((item) => item.id);
560:   // Pass effectiveMaxHops to constrain traversal in sparse mode.
561:   const neighborBoosts = getNeighborBoosts(seedIds, effectiveMaxHops);
562:   if (neighborBoosts.size === 0) {
563:     return { results, metadata };
564:   }
565: 
566:   // When SPECKIT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL is enabled, re-score neighbor boosts
567:   // using the intent-aware traversal formula: seedScore * edgePrior * hopDecay * freshness.
568:   // We use the average seed score as the seedScore proxy and the actual hop distance
569:   // returned by getNeighborBoosts(). This preserves backward compatibility: when flag
570:   // is OFF, the original boost values from getNeighborBoosts() are used unchanged.
571:   const intentBoosts: Map<number, number> = new Map();
572:   if (isTypedTraversalEnabled()) {
573:     const avgSeedScore = seedResults.length > 0
574:       ? seedResults.map((s) => resolveBaseScore(s)).reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / seedResults.length
575:       : 1.0;
576:     const clampedFreshness = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, Number.isFinite(freshness) ? freshness : 1.0));
577: 
578:     for (const [neighborId, neighborBoost] of neighborBoosts) {
579:       // We don't have the per-edge relation type at this aggregation level,
580:       // so we use the seed's dominant relation by querying the first-hop edge from the DB.
581:       // Fall back to 'caused' (neutral default) if unavailable.
582:       let dominantRelation = 'caused';
583:       if (db) {
584:         try {
585:           const edgeRow = (db.prepare(`
586:             SELECT relation FROM causal_edges
587:             WHERE source_id IN (${seedIds.map(() => '?').join(',')})
588:               AND target_id = ?
589:             LIMIT 1
590:           `) as Database.Statement).get(...seedIds.map(String), String(neighborId)) as
591:             { relation: string } | undefined;
592:           if (edgeRow?.relation) dominantRelation = edgeRow.relation;
593:         } catch (_err: unknown) {
594:           // Fall back to default relation on query failure
595:         }
596:       }
597: 
598:       const intentScore = computeIntentTraversalScore(
599:         avgSeedScore,
600:         dominantRelation,
601:         neighborBoost.hopCount,
602:         clampedFreshness,
603:         intent
604:       );
605:       intentBoosts.set(neighborId, intentScore);
606:     }
607:   }
608: 
609:   // Select the active boost map: intent-aware when the flag is on, classic otherwise.
610:   const classicBoosts = new Map<number, number>();
611:   for (const [neighborId, neighborBoost] of neighborBoosts) {
612:     classicBoosts.set(neighborId, neighborBoost.boost);
613:   }
614:   const activeBoosts = isTypedTraversalEnabled() ? intentBoosts : classicBoosts;
615: 
616:   const existingIds = new Set(results.map((item) => item.id));
617:   // Reduce avoids stack overflow on arrays >100K elements (spread pushes all onto call stack)
618:   const lowestScore = Math.max(0.0001, results.map((item) => resolveBaseScore(item)).reduce((a, b) => Math.min(a, b), Infinity));
619: 
620:   const boosted = results.map((item) => {
621:     const causalBoost = activeBoosts.get(item.id) ?? 0;
622:     if (causalBoost <= 0) {
623:       return item;
624:     }
625: 
626:     const sessionBoost = typeof item.sessionBoost === 'number' ? Math.max(0, item.sessionBoost) : 0;
627:     const allowedBoost = Math.max(0, Math.min(causalBoost, MAX_COMBINED_BOOST - sessionBoost));
628:     if (allowedBoost <= 0) {
629:       return item;
630:     }
631: 
632:     const baseScore = resolveBaseScore(item);
633:     const score = Math.min(1, Math.max(0, baseScore * (1 + allowedBoost)));
634:     metadata.boostedCount += 1;
635:     metadata.maxBoostApplied = Math.max(metadata.maxBoostApplied, allowedBoost);
636:     return {
637:       ...item,
638:       score,
639:       rrfScore: score,
640:       intentAdjustedScore: score,
641:       attentionScore: score,
642:       causalBoost: allowedBoost,
643:       baseScore,
644:     };
645:   });
646: 
647:   const injectIds: number[] = [];
648:   for (const [neighborId] of activeBoosts) {
649:     if (!existingIds.has(neighborId)) {
650:       injectIds.push(neighborId);
651:     }
652:   }
653: 
654:   const injectedRows = fetchNeighborRows(injectIds).map((row) => {
655:     const causalBoost = Math.max(0, Math.min(activeBoosts.get(row.id) ?? 0, MAX_COMBINED_BOOST));
656:     metadata.maxBoostApplied = Math.max(metadata.maxBoostApplied, causalBoost);
657:     const baseScore = lowestScore * 0.5;
658:     return buildPipelineRow(row, baseScore, causalBoost);
659:   });
660: 
661:   metadata.injectedCount = injectedRows.length;
662:   metadata.applied = metadata.boostedCount > 0 || metadata.injectedCount > 0;
663: 
664:   const merged = [...boosted, ...injectedRows].sort((left, right) => {
665:     const leftScore = resolveBaseScore(left);
666:     const rightScore = resolveBaseScore(right);
667:     if (rightScore === leftScore) {
668:       return left.id - right.id;
669:     }
670:     return rightScore - leftScore;
671:   });
672: 
673:   return { results: merged, metadata };
674: }
675: 
676: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
677: // ALWAYS-ON GRAPH CONTEXT INJECTION
678: // ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
679: 
680: /**
681:  * Graph context metadata returned by injectGraphContext.
682:  * Contains related memory IDs and edge types discovered from the graph
683:  * even when the causal boost has no seed results.
684:  */
685: interface GraphContextResult {
686:   /** Whether graph context injection was active and produced results. */
687:   activated: boolean;
688:   /** Canonical concept names matched from the query. */
689:   matchedConcepts: string[];
690:   /** Memory IDs of graph neighbors related to matched concepts. */
691:   relatedMemoryIds: number[];
692:   /** Edge relation types connecting seeds to neighbors. */
693:   edgeTypes: string[];
694: }
695: 
696: /**
697:  * Always-on graph context injection.
698:  *
699:  * Runs concept routing on the query and finds graph neighbors for matched
700:  * concepts, returning graph context metadata (related memory IDs, edge types).
701:  * Unlike applyCausalBoost, this runs even when there are no seed results,
702:  * enabling proactive graph-guided context discovery.
703:  *
704:  * Feature-gated by SPECKIT_GRAPH_CONTEXT_INJECTION (default ON).
705:  * Fail-open: returns empty result on any error.
706:  *
707:  * @param query - The search query string.
708:  * @param database - SQLite database instance for graph lookups.
709:  * @returns GraphContextResult with related memory IDs and edge types.
710:  */
711: function injectGraphContext(
712:   query: string,
713:   database: Database.Database,
714: ): GraphContextResult {
715:   const empty: GraphContextResult = {
716:     activated: false,
717:     matchedConcepts: [],
718:     relatedMemoryIds: [],
719:     edgeTypes: [],
720:   };
721: 
722:   if (!isGraphContextInjectionEnabled()) return empty;
723: 
724:   try {
725:     const routing = routeQueryConcepts(query, database);
726:     if (!routing.graphActivated || routing.concepts.length === 0) return empty;
727: 
728:     // Find seed memory IDs whose titles contain matched concept keywords
729:     const likeClauses = routing.concepts.map(() => 'LOWER(title) LIKE ?').join(' OR ');
730:     const likeParams = routing.concepts.map((c) => `%${c.toLowerCase()}%`);
731: 
732:     const seedRows = (database.prepare(`
733:       SELECT id FROM memory_index WHERE (${likeClauses}) LIMIT 10
734:     `) as Database.Statement).all(...likeParams) as Array<{ id: number }>;
735: 
736:     if (seedRows.length === 0) {
737:       return { ...empty, activated: true, matchedConcepts: routing.concepts };
738:     }
739: 
740:     const seedIds = seedRows.map((r) => String(r.id));
741:     const seedPlaceholders = seedIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
742: 
743:     // Walk 1-hop causal edges to find neighbor nodes and edge types
744:     const neighborRows = (database.prepare(`
745:       SELECT DISTINCT
746:         CASE
747:           WHEN ce.source_id IN (${seedPlaceholders}) THEN CAST(ce.target_id AS INTEGER)
748:           ELSE CAST(ce.source_id AS INTEGER)
749:         END AS neighbor_id,
750:         ce.relation
751:       FROM causal_edges ce
752:       WHERE ce.source_id IN (${seedPlaceholders}) OR ce.target_id IN (${seedPlaceholders})
753:       LIMIT 20
754:     `) as Database.Statement).all(
755:       ...seedIds,
756:       ...seedIds,
757:       ...seedIds,
758:     ) as Array<{ neighbor_id: number; relation: string }>;
759: 
760:     const relatedMemoryIds: number[] = [];
761:     const edgeTypes = new Set<string>();
762:     const seedIdSet = new Set(seedRows.map((r) => r.id));
763: 
764:     for (const row of neighborRows) {
765:       if (!seedIdSet.has(row.neighbor_id) && Number.isFinite(row.neighbor_id)) {
766:         relatedMemoryIds.push(row.neighbor_id);
767:       }
768:       if (row.relation) {
769:         edgeTypes.add(row.relation);
770:       }
771:     }
772: 
773:     return {
774:       activated: true,
775:       matchedConcepts: routing.concepts,
776:       relatedMemoryIds: [...new Set(relatedMemoryIds)].slice(0, 10),
777:       edgeTypes: Array.from(edgeTypes),
778:     };
779:   } catch (error: unknown) {
780:     const message = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
781:     console.warn(`[causal-boost] injectGraphContext failed (fail-open): ${message}`);
782:     return empty;
783:   }
784: }
785: 
786: export {
787:   MAX_HOPS,
788:   MAX_BOOST_PER_HOP,
789:   RELATION_WEIGHT_MULTIPLIERS,
790:   // D3 Phase A exports
791:   SPARSE_DENSITY_THRESHOLD,
792:   SPARSE_MAX_HOPS,
793:   DEFAULT_TYPED_TRAVERSAL_DEPTH,
794:   INTENT_EDGE_PRIORITY,
795:   DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIORITY,
796:   DEFAULT_EDGE_PRIOR,
797:   EDGE_PRIOR_TIERS,
798:   EDGE_LABEL_ALIASES,
799:   init,
800:   isEnabled,
801:   isTypedTraversalEnabled,
802:   isSparseMode,
803:   resolveSparseFirstTraversalPolicy,
804:   resolveTraversalDepth,
805:   resolveEdgePrior,
806:   computeHopDecay,
807:   computeIntentTraversalScore,
808:   getIntentEdgePriorities,
809:   computeIntentEdgePrior,
810:   computeTraversalHopDecay,
811:   computeTraversalFreshnessFactor,
812:   computeIntentAwareTraversalScore,
813:   getNeighborBoosts,
814:   applyCausalBoost,
815:   // Always-on graph context injection
816:   injectGraphContext,
817: };
818: 
819: export type {
820:   RankedSearchResult,
821:   CausalBoostMetadata,
822:   CausalBoostOptions,
823:   SparseFirstTraversalPolicy,
824:   GraphContextResult,
825: };

33:  * Higher values amplify the propagated strength; values < 1.0 dampen it.
34:  */
35: const RELATION_WEIGHTS: Record<string, number> = {
36:   supersedes:   1.5,  // Strongest signal — new info replaces old
37:   caused:       1.3,  // Strong causal link
38:   enabled:      1.1,  // Weak causal link
39:   supports:     1.0,  // Neutral / default
40:   derived_from: 1.0,  // Neutral / default

59:   if (!value) return fallback;

79: function clampStrength(strength: number): number | null {
80:   if (!Number.isFinite(strength)) return null;
81:   return Math.max(0, Math.min(1, strength));
82: }

95:     created_by: String(row.created_by ?? 'manual'),
96:     last_accessed: row.last_accessed == null ? null : String(row.last_accessed),

187: let db: Database.Database | null = null;

190: /**
191:  * Monotonically-increasing generation counter bumped on every causal-edge
192:  * mutation (insert/update/delete/rollback). Read-only callers can include this
193:  * value in cache keys (e.g. memory_search when `enableCausalBoost=true`) so
194:  * cached responses derived from the causal graph become stale on the next
195:  * lookup without requiring a wholesale tool-cache invalidation.
196:  *
197:  * targeted memory_search cache invalidation.
198:  */
199: let causalEdgesGeneration = 0;
200: 
201: function bumpCausalEdgesGeneration(): void {
202:   // Wrap counter near MAX_SAFE_INTEGER to avoid overflow in ultra-long-lived
203:   // Processes; consumers only compare for inequality, so wrapping is safe.
204:   causalEdgesGeneration = causalEdgesGeneration >= Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER
205:     ? 1
206:     : causalEdgesGeneration + 1;
207: }
208: 
209: function getCausalEdgesGeneration(): number {
210:   return causalEdgesGeneration;
211: }
212: 
213: function setLastInsertEdgeOutcome(outcome: InsertEdgeOutcome): void {
214:   lastInsertEdgeOutcome = outcome;
215: }
216: 
217: function getLastInsertEdgeOutcome(): InsertEdgeOutcome | null {
218:   return lastInsertEdgeOutcome;
219: }
220: 
221: function invalidateDegreeCache(): void {
222:   // bump the causal-edges generation FIRST so any cache key that
223:   // includes it (e.g. memory_search when enableCausalBoost=true) becomes
224:   // stale on the next read without invalidating unrelated tool entries.
225:   bumpCausalEdgesGeneration();
226: 
227:   try {
228:     // H1 FIX: Use db-specific cache invalidation instead of the no-op global version
229:     if (db) {
230:       clearDegreeCacheForDb(db);
231:     }
232:   } catch (_error: unknown) {
233:     // Cache invalidation is best-effort; never block edge mutations
234:   }
235:   try {
236:     clearGraphSignalsCache();
237:   } catch (_error: unknown) {
238:     // Graph signals cache invalidation is best-effort
239:   }
240: }

242: function enforceRelationWindowCap(
243:   relation: string,
244:   database: Database.Database,
245:   windowMs: number = WINDOW_MS,
246:   capPerWindow: number = CAP_PER_WINDOW,
247: ): boolean {
248:   try {
249:     const windowStart = new Date(Date.now() - windowMs).toISOString();
250:     const row = (database.prepare(`
251:       SELECT COUNT(*) as count FROM causal_edges
252:       WHERE relation = ?
253:         AND datetime(extracted_at) >= datetime(?)
254:     `) as Database.Statement).get(relation, windowStart) as { count: number };
255:     const count = row.count;
256:     if (count >= capPerWindow) {
257:       console.warn(`[causal-edges] cap exceeded for relation ${relation}: ${count}/${capPerWindow} in ${windowMs}ms window`);
258:       return false;
259:     }
260:     return true;
261:   } catch (error: unknown) {
262:     const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
263:     console.warn(`[causal-edges] relation cap check failed for ${relation}: ${msg}`);
264:     return true;
265:   }
266: }

292: function insertEdge(
293:   sourceId: string,
294:   targetId: string,
295:   relation: RelationType,
296:   strength: number = 1.0,
297:   evidence: string | null = null,
298:   shouldInvalidateCache: boolean = true,
299:   createdBy: string = 'manual',
300:   anchors: { sourceAnchor?: string | null; targetAnchor?: string | null } = {},
301:   metadata: InsertEdgeMetadataOptions = {},
302: ): number | null {
303:   lastInsertEdgeOutcome = null;
304:   if (!db) {
305:     console.warn('[causal-edges] Database not initialized. Server may still be starting up.');
306:     setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'database not initialized', edgeId: null });
307:     return null;
308:   }
309:   const database = db;
310: 
311:   // NFR-R01: Auto edges capped at MAX_AUTO_STRENGTH
312:   const effectiveStrength = isAutoEdgeCreator(createdBy)
313:     ? Math.min(strength, MAX_AUTO_STRENGTH)
314:     : strength;
315: 
316:   // Prevent self-loops
317:   if (sourceId === targetId) {
318:     setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'self-loop', edgeId: null });
319:     return null;
320:   }
321: 
322:   // FK check deferred — test environments use synthetic IDs not in memory_index.
323:   // Implementing FK validation would require seeding memory_index in 20+ causal edge tests.
324: 
325:   // NFR-R01: Edge bounds — reject if node already has MAX_EDGES_PER_NODE auto edges
326:   if (isAutoEdgeCreator(createdBy)) {
327:     const edgeCount = countEdgesForNode(sourceId);
328:     if (edgeCount >= MAX_EDGES_PER_NODE) {
329:       console.warn(`[causal-edges] Edge bounds: node ${sourceId} has ${edgeCount} edges (max ${MAX_EDGES_PER_NODE}), rejecting auto edge`);
330:       setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'edge bounds exceeded', edgeId: null });
331:       return null;
332:     }
333:   }
334: 
335:   try {
336:     const clampedStrength = clampStrength(effectiveStrength);
337:     if (clampedStrength === null) {
338:       console.warn('[causal-edges] insertEdge rejected non-finite strength');
339:       setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'non-finite strength', edgeId: null });
340:       return null;
341:     }
342: 
343:     // Wrap SELECT + UPSERT + logWeightChange in a transaction for atomicity
344:     const rowId = database.transaction(() => {
345:       if (isTemporalEdgesEnabled()) {
346:         detectContradictions(
347:           database,
348:           Number.parseInt(sourceId, 10),
349:           Number.parseInt(targetId, 10),
350:           relation,
351:         );
352:       }
353: 
354:       // Check if edge exists (for weight_history logging on conflict update).
355:       // This SELECT is intentional: we need the old strength to decide whether
356:       // To write a weight_history row after the upsert. The subsequent INSERT
357:       // Uses last_insert_rowid() to avoid a second post-upsert SELECT.
358:       const existing = (database.prepare(`
359:         SELECT id, strength, evidence, created_by FROM causal_edges
360:         WHERE source_id = ? AND target_id = ? AND relation = ?
361:           AND COALESCE(source_anchor, '') = COALESCE(?, '')
362:           AND COALESCE(target_anchor, '') = COALESCE(?, '')
363:       `) as Database.Statement).get(
364:         sourceId,
365:         targetId,
366:         relation,
367:         anchors.sourceAnchor ?? null,
368:         anchors.targetAnchor ?? null,
369:       ) as { id: number; strength: number; evidence: string | null; created_by: string | null } | undefined;
370: 
371:       // Manual/curated edges must never be overwritten by automatic writers:
372:       // an auto upsert against a non-auto row is skipped so curated provenance
373:       // and strength survive. Auto-to-auto updates remain allowed under caps.
374:       if (existing && isAutoEdgeCreator(createdBy) && !isAutoEdgeCreator(existing.created_by ?? 'manual')) {
375:         console.warn(
376:           `[causal-edges] skipped manual edge ${existing.id} (created_by=${existing.created_by ?? 'manual'}); skipped overwrite by ${createdBy}`,
377:         );
378:         setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'skipped manual edge', edgeId: existing.id });
379:         return 0;
380:       }
381: 
382:       const columns = new Set((database.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(causal_edges)').all() as Array<{ name: string }>)
383:         .map((column) => column.name));
384: 
385:       if (existing) {
386:         const assignments = [
387:           'strength = ?',
388:           'evidence = COALESCE(?, evidence)',
389:           'created_by = ?',
390:         ];
391:         const params: unknown[] = [clampedStrength, evidence, createdBy];
392:         if (columns.has('confidence') && metadata.confidence !== undefined) {
393:           assignments.push('confidence = ?');
394:           params.push(metadata.confidence);
395:         }
396:         if (columns.has('extraction_method') && metadata.extractionMethod !== undefined) {
397:           assignments.push('extraction_method = ?');
398:           params.push(metadata.extractionMethod);
399:         }
400:         params.push(existing.id);
401: 
402:         (database.prepare(`
403:           UPDATE causal_edges
404:           SET ${assignments.join(',\n              ')}
405:           WHERE id = ?
406:         `) as Database.Statement).run(...params);
407:         setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'updated', reason: null, edgeId: existing.id });
408:       } else {
409:         if (!enforceRelationWindowCap(relation, database)) {
410:           setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: 'relation cap exceeded', edgeId: null });
411:           return 0;
412:         }
413: 
414:         const insertColumns = [
415:           'source_id',
416:           'target_id',
417:           'source_anchor',
418:           'target_anchor',
419:           'relation',
420:           'strength',
421:           'evidence',
422:           'created_by',
423:         ];
424:         const insertValues: unknown[] = [
425:           sourceId,
426:           targetId,
427:           anchors.sourceAnchor ?? null,
428:           anchors.targetAnchor ?? null,
429:           relation,
430:           clampedStrength,
431:           evidence,
432:           createdBy,
433:         ];
434:         if (columns.has('confidence') && metadata.confidence !== undefined) {
435:           insertColumns.push('confidence');
436:           insertValues.push(metadata.confidence);
437:         }
438:         if (columns.has('extraction_method') && metadata.extractionMethod !== undefined) {
439:           insertColumns.push('extraction_method');
440:           insertValues.push(metadata.extractionMethod);
441:         }
442: 
443:         (database.prepare(`
444:           INSERT INTO causal_edges (
445:             ${insertColumns.join(',\n            ')}
446:           )
447:           VALUES (${insertColumns.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
448:         `) as Database.Statement).run(...insertValues);
449:       }
450: 
451:       const row = (database.prepare(`
452:         SELECT id FROM causal_edges
453:         WHERE source_id = ? AND target_id = ? AND relation = ?
454:           AND COALESCE(source_anchor, '') = COALESCE(?, '')
455:           AND COALESCE(target_anchor, '') = COALESCE(?, '')
456:       `) as Database.Statement).get(
457:         sourceId,
458:         targetId,
459:         relation,
460:         anchors.sourceAnchor ?? null,
461:         anchors.targetAnchor ?? null,
462:       ) as { id: number } | undefined;
463:       const rowId = row ? row.id : 0;
464:       if (!existing && rowId) {
465:         setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'inserted', reason: null, edgeId: rowId });
466:       }
467: 
468:       // Log weight change on conflict update
469:       if (existing && rowId && isFiniteNumber(existing.strength) && existing.strength !== clampedStrength) {
470:         logWeightChange(rowId, existing.strength, clampedStrength, createdBy, 'insert-upsert');
471:       }
472: 
473:       return rowId;
474:     })();
475: 
476:     if (shouldInvalidateCache) {
477:       invalidateDegreeCache();
478:     }
479: 
480:     return rowId || null;
481:   } catch (error: unknown) {
482:     const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
483:     console.warn(`[causal-edges] insertEdge error: ${msg}`);
484:     setLastInsertEdgeOutcome({ status: 'skipped', reason: msg, edgeId: null });
485:     if (/SQLITE_BUSY|SQLITE_LOCKED|database is locked/i.test(msg)) {
486:       throw error;
487:     }
488:     return null;
489:   }
490: }

492: function insertEdgesBatch(
493:   edges: Array<{
494:     sourceId: string;
495:     targetId: string;
496:     relation: RelationType;
497:     strength?: number;
498:     evidence?: string | null;
499:     createdBy?: string;
500:     sourceAnchor?: string | null;
501:     targetAnchor?: string | null;
502:     confidence?: number;
503:     extractionMethod?: string;
504:   }>
505: ): { inserted: number; failed: number; skippedManual: number } {
506:   if (!db) return { inserted: 0, failed: edges.length, skippedManual: 0 };
507: 
508:   let inserted = 0;
509:   let failed = 0;
510:   let skippedManual = 0;
511: 
512:   const insertTx = db.transaction(() => {
513:     for (const edge of edges) {
514:       const id = insertEdge(
515:         edge.sourceId,
516:         edge.targetId,
517:         edge.relation,
518:         edge.strength ?? 1.0,
519:         edge.evidence ?? null,
520:         false,
521:         edge.createdBy ?? 'manual',
522:         {
523:           sourceAnchor: edge.sourceAnchor ?? null,
524:           targetAnchor: edge.targetAnchor ?? null,
525:         },
526:         {
527:           confidence: edge.confidence,
528:           extractionMethod: edge.extractionMethod,
529:         },
530:       );
531:       if (id !== null) inserted++;
532:       else {
533:         failed++;
534:         if (getLastInsertEdgeOutcome()?.reason === 'skipped manual edge') {
535:           skippedManual++;
536:         }
537:       }
538:     }
539:   });
540: 
541:   try {
542:     insertTx();
543:     if (inserted > 0) {
544:       invalidateDegreeCache();
545:     }
546:   } catch (error: unknown) {
547:     const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
548:     console.warn(`[causal-edges] insertEdgesBatch error: ${msg}`);
549:   }
550: 
551:   return { inserted, failed, skippedManual };
552: }
553: 
554: function bulkInsertEdges(edges: Array<Record<string, unknown>>): { inserted: number; failed: number } {
555:   if (!db) return { inserted: 0, failed: edges.length };
556: 
557:   const database = db;
558:   let inserted = 0;
559:   let failed = 0;
560: 
561:   try {
562:     const edgeColumns = (database.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(causal_edges)').all() as Array<{ name: string }>)
563:       .map((column) => column.name)
564:       .filter((name) => typeof name === 'string' && name.length > 0 && name !== 'id');
565: 
566:     if (edgeColumns.length === 0) {
567:       return { inserted: 0, failed: edges.length };
568:     }
569: 
570:     const insertEdgeStmt = database.prepare(`
571:       INSERT OR IGNORE INTO causal_edges (${edgeColumns.join(', ')})
572:       VALUES (${edgeColumns.map(() => '?').join(', ')})
573:     `) as Database.Statement;
574: 
575:     const insertTx = database.transaction(() => {
576:       for (const edge of edges) {
577:         if (!edge || typeof edge.source_id !== 'string' || typeof edge.target_id !== 'string') {
578:           failed++;
579:           continue;
580:         }
581:         if (typeof edge.relation !== 'string' || edge.relation.trim().length === 0) {
582:           failed++;
583:           continue;
584:         }
585:         if (edge.source_id === edge.target_id) {
586:           failed++;
587:           continue;
588:         }
589:         if (!enforceRelationWindowCap(edge.relation, database)) {
590:           failed++;
591:           continue;
592:         }
593: 
594:         const result = insertEdgeStmt.run(...edgeColumns.map((column) => edge[column] ?? null)) as { changes: number };
595:         if (result.changes > 0) {
596:           inserted++;
597:         }
598:       }
599:     });
600: 
601:     insertTx();
602:     if (inserted > 0) {
603:       invalidateDegreeCache();
604:     }
605:   } catch (error: unknown) {
606:     const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
607:     console.warn(`[causal-edges] bulkInsertEdges error: ${msg}`);
608:   }
609: 
610:   return { inserted, failed };
611: }

624: function getEdgesFrom(sourceId: string, limit: number = MAX_EDGES_LIMIT): EdgeQueryResult {
625:   if (!db) return createEdgeQueryResult([], limit, false);
626: 
627:   try {
628:     const rows = (db.prepare(`
629:       SELECT * FROM causal_edges
630:       WHERE source_id = ?
631:       ORDER BY strength DESC
632:       LIMIT ?
633:     `) as Database.Statement).all(sourceId, limit + 1) as CausalEdgeRow[];
634:     const truncated = rows.length > limit;
635:     const edges = (truncated ? rows.slice(0, limit) : rows).map(normalizeCausalEdgeRow);
636:     for (const edge of edges) {
637:       try { touchEdgeAccess(edge.id); } catch (e: unknown) {
638:         console.warn(`[causal-edges] touchEdgeAccess failed for edge ${edge.id}: ${e instanceof Error ? e.message : String(e)}`);
639:       }
640:     }
641:     return createEdgeQueryResult(edges, limit, truncated);
642:   } catch (error: unknown) {
643:     const msg = error instanceof Error ? error.message : String(error);
644:     console.warn(`[causal-edges] getEdgesFrom error: ${msg}`);
645:     return createEdgeQueryResult([], limit, false);
646:   }

694:    6. GRAPH TRAVERSAL
695: ----------------------------------------------------------------*/
696: 
697: function getCausalChain(
698:   rootId: string,
699:   maxDepth: number = DEFAULT_MAX_DEPTH,
700:   direction: 'forward' | 'backward' = 'forward',
701:   edgeLimit: number = MAX_EDGES_LIMIT,
702: ): CausalChainNode {
703:   const root: CausalChainNode = {
704:     id: rootId,
705:     depth: 0,
706:     relation: RELATION_TYPES.CAUSED,
707:     strength: 1.0,
708:     children: [],
709:     truncated: false,
710:     truncationLimit: null,
711:   };
712: 
713:   if (!db) return root;
714: 
715:   function traverse(node: CausalChainNode, depth: number, path: Set<string>): void {
716:     if (depth >= maxDepth) return;
717: 
718:     const edges = direction === 'forward'
719:       ? getEdgesFrom(node.id, edgeLimit)
720:       : getEdgesTo(node.id, edgeLimit);
721: 
722:     if (edges.truncated) {
723:       root.truncated = true;
724:       root.truncationLimit = edgeLimit;
725:     }
726: 
727:     for (const edge of edges) {
728:       const nextId = direction === 'forward' ? edge.target_id : edge.source_id;
729:       if (path.has(nextId)) continue;
730: 
731:       // C138: apply cumulative path strength with relation weight multiplier,
732:       // then clamp back to [0, 1].
733:       const weight = RELATION_WEIGHTS[edge.relation] ?? 1.0;
734:       const weightedStrength = clampStrength(node.strength * edge.strength * weight) ?? 0;
735: 
736:       const child: CausalChainNode = {
737:         id: nextId,
738:         edgeId: edge.id,               // Preserve edge ID for unlink workflow
739:         depth: depth + 1,
740:         relation: edge.relation,
741:         strength: weightedStrength,
742:         children: [],
743:       };
744: 
745:       node.children.push(child);
746:       const nextPath = new Set(path);
747:       nextPath.add(nextId);
748:       traverse(child, depth + 1, nextPath);
749:     }
750:   }
751: 
752:   traverse(root, 0, new Set([rootId]));
753:   return root;
754: }

760: function updateEdge(

763:   changedBy: string = 'manual',

769:   try {

774:     if (updates.strength !== undefined) {
775:       const clampedStrength = clampStrength(updates.strength);
776:       if (clampedStrength === null) {

778:         return false;
779:       }
780:       nextStrength = clampedStrength;
781:       parts.push('strength = ?');
782:       params.push(clampedStrength);

799:     params.push(edgeId);
800: 
801:     // Wrap SELECT + UPDATE + logWeightChange in a transaction for atomicity
802:     const changed = database.transaction(() => {
803:       // Capture old strength for weight_history logging
804:       let oldStrength: number | undefined;
805:       if (updates.strength !== undefined) {
806:         const existing = (database.prepare(
807:           'SELECT strength FROM causal_edges WHERE id = ?'
808:         ) as Database.Statement).get(edgeId) as { strength: number } | undefined;
809:         oldStrength = existing?.strength;

811: 
812:       // String interpolation constructs IN(?,?,?) placeholder list only —
813:       // All user values are parameterized. Accepted exception per audit H-08.
814:       const result = (database.prepare(
815:         `UPDATE causal_edges SET ${parts.join(', ')} WHERE id = ?`
816:       ) as Database.Statement).run(...params);

820:       // Log weight change to weight_history

822:         if (oldStrength !== nextStrength) {

1056: function rollbackWeights(edgeId: number, toTimestamp: string): boolean {
1057:   if (!db) return false;
1058:   const database = db;
1059:   try {
1060:     // Wrap SELECTs + UPDATE + logWeightChange in a transaction for atomicity
1061:     const changed = database.transaction(() => {
1062:       // Get current strength before rollback
1063:       const current = (database.prepare(
1064:         'SELECT strength FROM causal_edges WHERE id = ?'
1065:       ) as Database.Statement).get(edgeId) as { strength: number } | undefined;
1066:       if (!current) return null;
1067: 
1068:       // Prefer the latest exact-timestamp row to make same-second
1069:       // History entries deterministic when callers pass a value from getWeightHistory().
1070:       let entry = (database.prepare(`
1071:         SELECT old_strength FROM weight_history
1072:         WHERE edge_id = ? AND changed_at = ?
1073:         ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
1074:       `) as Database.Statement).get(edgeId, toTimestamp) as { old_strength: number } | undefined;
1075: 
1076:       // Find the earliest history entry strictly after the target timestamp.
1077:       // This preserves legacy "rollback to before next change" semantics for
1078:       // Timestamps that do not exactly match a stored history row.
1079:       if (!entry) {
1080:         entry = (database.prepare(`
1081:         SELECT old_strength FROM weight_history
1082:         WHERE edge_id = ? AND changed_at > ?
1083:         ORDER BY changed_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
1084:       `) as Database.Statement).get(edgeId, toTimestamp) as { old_strength: number } | undefined;
1085:       }
1086: 
1087:       if (!entry) {
1088:         // Fall back: get the oldest entry's old_strength (pre-change baseline)
1089:         entry = (database.prepare(`
1090:           SELECT old_strength FROM weight_history
1091:           WHERE edge_id = ?
1092:           ORDER BY changed_at ASC, id ASC LIMIT 1
1093:         `) as Database.Statement).get(edgeId) as { old_strength: number } | undefined;
1094:       }
1095:       if (!entry) return null;
1096: 
1097:       // Restore the edge to the old_strength value
1098:       const result = (database.prepare(
1099:         'UPDATE causal_edges SET strength = ? WHERE id = ?'
1100:       ) as Database.Statement).run(entry.old_strength, edgeId);
1101: 
1102:       // Log the rollback
1103:       if (isFiniteNumber(current.strength) && current.strength !== entry.old_strength) {
1104:         logWeightChange(edgeId, current.strength, entry.old_strength, 'rollback', `rollback to ${toTimestamp}`);
1105:       }
1106: 
1107:       return (result as { changes: number }).changes > 0;
1108:     })();
1109: 
1110:     if (changed === null) return false;
1111:     invalidateDegreeCache();
1112:     return changed;
1113:   } catch (error: unknown) {

81:   createIndex(
82:     database,
83:     'idx_causal_edge_tombstones_identity',
84:     `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_causal_edge_tombstones_identity
85:        ON causal_edge_tombstones(source_id, target_id, relation, lifecycle_generation DESC)`,
86:     context,
87:   );
88:   createIndex(
89:     database,
90:     'idx_causal_edge_tombstones_tombstoned_at',
91:     `CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_causal_edge_tombstones_tombstoned_at
92:        ON causal_edge_tombstones(tombstoned_at DESC)`,
93:     context,
94:   );
95:   createIndex(
96:     database,
97:     'idx_causal_edge_tombstones_reason',
98:     'CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_causal_edge_tombstones_reason ON causal_edge_tombstones(reason)',
99:     context,
100:   );
101: }
102: 
103: function emptySweepResult(): SweepResult {
104:   return { matched: 0, tombstoned: 0, deleted: 0, edgeIds: [], tombstoneIds: [] };
105: }
106: 
107: function uniquePositiveEdgeIds(edgeIds: readonly number[] | undefined): number[] {
108:   return Array.from(new Set((edgeIds ?? [])
109:     .filter((id) => Number.isSafeInteger(id) && id > 0)));
110: }
111: 
112: function uniqueMemoryIds(memoryIds: readonly (number | string)[] | undefined): string[] {
113:   return Array.from(new Set((memoryIds ?? [])
114:     .map((id) => String(id).trim())
115:     .filter((id) => id.length > 0)));
116: }
117: 
118: function buildEdgeSelect(options: SweepOptions): { whereSql: string; params: unknown[] } {
119:   const edgeIds = uniquePositiveEdgeIds(options.edgeIds);
120:   if (edgeIds.length > 0) {
121:     return {
122:       whereSql: `id IN (${edgeIds.map(() => '?').join(', ')})`,
123:       params: edgeIds,
124:     };
125:   }
126: 
127:   const memoryIds = uniqueMemoryIds(options.memoryIds);
128:   if (memoryIds.length > 0) {
129:     const placeholders = memoryIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
130:     return {
131:       whereSql: `(source_id IN (${placeholders}) OR target_id IN (${placeholders}))`,
132:       params: [...memoryIds, ...memoryIds],
133:     };
134:   }
135: 
136:   if (options.whereSql && options.whereSql.trim().length > 0) {
137:     return {
138:       whereSql: options.whereSql,
139:       params: [...(options.params ?? [])],
140:     };
141:   }
142: 
143:   throw new Error('Causal edge sweep requires edgeIds, memoryIds, or whereSql');
144: }
145: 
146: const OPTIONAL_EDGE_COLUMNS: readonly string[] = [
147:   'source_anchor',
148:   'target_anchor',
149:   'strength',
150:   'evidence',
151:   'extracted_at',
152:   'created_by',
153:   'confidence',
154:   'extraction_method',
155:   'last_accessed',
156: ];
157: 
158: function readEdges(database: Database.Database, options: SweepOptions): CausalEdgeSnapshot[] {
159:   const selector = buildEdgeSelect(options);
160:   const existingColumns = new Set(
161:     (database.prepare('PRAGMA table_info(causal_edges)').all() as Array<{ name: string }>)
162:       .map((column) => column.name),
163:   );
164:   const optionalSelects = OPTIONAL_EDGE_COLUMNS
165:     .map((columnName) => (existingColumns.has(columnName)
166:       ? columnName
167:       : `NULL AS ${columnName}`))
168:     .join(',\n      ');
169:   return database.prepare(`
170:     SELECT
171:       id,
172:       source_id,
173:       target_id,
174:       relation,
175:       ${optionalSelects}
176:     FROM causal_edges
177:     WHERE ${selector.whereSql}
178:     ORDER BY id ASC
179:   `).all(...selector.params) as CausalEdgeSnapshot[];
180: }
181: 
182: function nextLifecycleGeneration(database: Database.Database, edge: CausalEdgeSnapshot): number {
183:   const row = database.prepare(`
184:     SELECT COALESCE(MAX(lifecycle_generation), 0) + 1 AS generation
185:     FROM causal_edge_tombstones
186:     WHERE source_id = ? AND target_id = ? AND relation = ?
187:   `).get(edge.source_id, edge.target_id, edge.relation) as { generation?: number } | undefined;
188: 
189:   return Number.isSafeInteger(row?.generation) && row!.generation! > 0 ? row!.generation! : 1;
190: }
191: 
192: function buildRestoreMetadata(edge: CausalEdgeSnapshot, options: SweepOptions): string {
193:   return JSON.stringify({
194:     edge,
195:     reason: options.reason,
196:     command: options.command ?? null,
197:     restoreContext: options.restoreContext ?? {},
198:   });
199: }
200: 
201: function deleteEdgesByIds(database: Database.Database, edgeIds: readonly number[]): number {
202:   let deleted = 0;
203:   const deleteStmt = database.prepare('DELETE FROM causal_edges WHERE id = ?');
204:   for (const edgeId of edgeIds) {
205:     const result = deleteStmt.run(edgeId) as { changes: number };
206:     deleted += result.changes;
207:   }
208:   return deleted;
209: }
210: 
211: function invalidateGraphCaches(database: Database.Database): void {
212:   try {
213:     clearDegreeCacheForDb(database);
214:   } catch (_error: unknown) {
215:     // Cache invalidation is best-effort after a durable edge delete.
216:   }
217:   try {
218:     clearGraphSignalsCache();
219:   } catch (_error: unknown) {
220:     // Cache invalidation is best-effort after a durable edge delete.
221:   }
222: }
223: 
224: function sweepCausalEdges(database: Database.Database, options: SweepOptions): SweepResult {
225:   if (!tableExists(database, 'causal_edges')) {
226:     return emptySweepResult();
227:   }
228: 
229:   const result = runInTransaction(database, () => {
230:     ensureCausalEdgeTombstoneSchema(database);
231:     const edges = readEdges(database, options);
232:     if (edges.length === 0) {
233:       return emptySweepResult();
234:     }
235: 
236:     const tombstoneIds: number[] = [];
237:     const insertTombstone = database.prepare(`
238:       INSERT INTO causal_edge_tombstones (
239:         source_id,
240:         target_id,
241:         relation,
242:         tombstoned_at,
243:         reason,
244:         lifecycle_generation,
245:         restore_metadata
246:       ) VALUES (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?)
247:     `);
248: 
249:     const tombstonedAt = new Date().toISOString();
250:     for (const edge of edges) {
251:       const insertResult = insertTombstone.run(
252:         edge.source_id,
253:         edge.target_id,
254:         edge.relation,
255:         tombstonedAt,
256:         options.reason,
257:         nextLifecycleGeneration(database, edge),
258:         buildRestoreMetadata(edge, options),
259:       ) as { lastInsertRowid: number | bigint };
260:       tombstoneIds.push(Number(insertResult.lastInsertRowid));
261:     }
262: 
263:     const edgeIds = edges.map((edge) => edge.id);
264:     const deleted = deleteEdgesByIds(database, edgeIds);
265:     return {
266:       matched: edges.length,
267:       tombstoned: tombstoneIds.length,
268:       deleted,
269:       edgeIds,
270:       tombstoneIds,
271:     };
272:   });
273: 
274:   if (result.deleted > 0 && options.invalidateCaches !== false) {
275:     invalidateGraphCaches(database);
276:   }
277: 
278:   return result;
279: }
280: 
281: export {
282:   ensureCausalEdgeTombstoneSchema,
283:   sweepCausalEdges,
284: };
285: 
286: export type {
287:   SweepOptions as CausalEdgeSweepOptions,
288:   SweepResult as CausalEdgeSweepResult,
289: };

12: 
13: type PromotedField = 'parent_id' | 'children_ids' | 'parentChain';

15: type RelationMapping = {
16:   field: PromotedField;
17:   relation: typeof causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES[keyof typeof causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES];

19:   target: 'current' | 'target';

27:   relation: typeof causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES[keyof typeof causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES];
28:   sourceAnchor: string;
29:   targetAnchor: string;
30:   field: PromotedField;
31: };
32: 
33: type ExtractedMetadataIntents = {
34:   currentPacketId: string;
35:   intents: EdgeIntent[];
36: };
37: 
38: type ResolvedEdgeIntent = EdgeIntent & {
39:   sourceId: number;
40:   targetId: number;
41: };
42: 
43: type PromotionInput = {
44:   memoryId: number;
45:   filePath: string;
46:   content?: string;
47: };
48: 
49: type PromotionWarning = {
50:   field: PromotedField;
51:   reference: string;
52:   message: string;
53: };
54: 
55: type PromotionResult = {
56:   processed: number;
57:   resolved: number;
58:   inserted: number;
59:   skippedManual: number;
60:   staleTombstoned: number;
61:   staleDeleted: number;
62:   warnings: PromotionWarning[];
63: };
64: 
65: const CREATED_BY = 'auto';
66: const EXTRACTION_METHOD = 'frontmatter';
67: const CONFIDENCE = 1.0;
68: 
69: const RELATION_MAPPINGS: readonly RelationMapping[] = [
70:   {
71:     field: 'parent_id',
72:     relation: causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES.DERIVED_FROM,
73:     source: 'current',
74:     target: 'target',
75:     sourceAnchor: 'metadata:parent_id',
76:   },
77:   {
78:     field: 'children_ids',
79:     relation: causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES.ENABLED,
80:     source: 'current',
81:     target: 'target',
82:     sourceAnchor: 'metadata:children_ids',
83:   },
84:   {
85:     field: 'parentChain',
86:     relation: causalEdges.RELATION_TYPES.DERIVED_FROM,
87:     source: 'current',
88:     target: 'target',
89:     sourceAnchor: 'metadata:parent_chain',
90:   },
91: ] as const;
92: 
93: function emptyResult(): PromotionResult {
94:   return {
95:     processed: 0,
96:     resolved: 0,
97:     inserted: 0,
98:     skippedManual: 0,
99:     staleTombstoned: 0,
100:     staleDeleted: 0,
101:     warnings: [],
102:   };
103: }
104: 
105: function isPromotableFile(filePath: string): boolean {
106:   const basename = path.basename(filePath);
107:   return basename === 'graph-metadata.json' || basename === 'description.json';
108: }
109: 
110: function normalizePacketId(value: string): string {
111:   return value
112:     .trim()
113:     .replace(/\\/g, '/')
114:     .replace(/^\/+/, '')
115:     .replace(/^\.opencode\/specs\//, '')
116:     .replace(/^specs\//, '')
117:     .replace(/\/graph-metadata\.json$/, '')
118:     .replace(/\/description\.json$/, '')
119:     .replace(/\/$/, '');
120: }
121: 
122: function uniqueNonEmpty(values: readonly string[]): string[] {
123:   return Array.from(new Set(values.map(normalizePacketId).filter(Boolean)));
124: }
125: 
126: function mappingFor(field: PromotedField): RelationMapping {
127:   const mapping = RELATION_MAPPINGS.find((candidate) => candidate.field === field);
128:   if (!mapping) {
129:     throw new Error(`Missing relation mapping for ${field}`);
130:   }
131:   return mapping;
132: }
133: 
134: function createIntent(currentPacketId: string, field: PromotedField, targetReference: string): EdgeIntent {
135:   const mapping = mappingFor(field);
136:   const targetPacketId = normalizePacketId(targetReference);
137:   return {
138:     sourcePacketId: mapping.source === 'current' ? currentPacketId : targetPacketId,
139:     targetPacketId: mapping.target === 'current' ? currentPacketId : targetPacketId,
140:     targetReference,
141:     relation: mapping.relation,
142:     sourceAnchor: mapping.sourceAnchor,
143:     targetAnchor: `packet:${targetPacketId}`,
144:     field,
145:   };
146: }
147: 
148: function extractGraphMetadataIntents(content: string): ExtractedMetadataIntents {
149:   const validation = validateGraphMetadataContent(content);
150:   if (!validation.ok) {
151:     throw new Error(`Invalid graph metadata: ${validation.errors.join('; ')}`);
152:   }
153: 
154:   const metadata = validation.metadata;
155:   const currentPacketId = normalizePacketId(metadata.packet_id || metadata.spec_folder);
156:   const intents: EdgeIntent[] = [];
157: 
158:   if (metadata.parent_id) {
159:     intents.push(createIntent(currentPacketId, 'parent_id', metadata.parent_id));
160:   }
161:   for (const childId of uniqueNonEmpty(metadata.children_ids)) {
162:     intents.push(createIntent(currentPacketId, 'children_ids', childId));
163:   }
164: 
165:   return { currentPacketId, intents };
166: }
167: 
168: function extractDescriptionIntents(content: string): ExtractedMetadataIntents {
169:   const parsed = JSON.parse(content) as unknown;
170:   const validation = perFolderDescriptionSchema.safeParse(parsed);
171:   if (!validation.success) {
172:     throw new Error(`Invalid description metadata: ${validation.error.issues.map((issue) => issue.message).join('; ')}`);
173:   }
174: 
175:   const metadata = validation.data;
176:   const currentPacketId = normalizePacketId(metadata.specFolder);
177:   const intents = uniqueNonEmpty(metadata.parentChain ?? [])
178:     .map((ancestorId) => createIntent(currentPacketId, 'parentChain', ancestorId));
179:   return { currentPacketId, intents };
180: }
181: 
182: function extractMetadataIntents(filePath: string, content: string): ExtractedMetadataIntents | null {
183:   const basename = path.basename(filePath);
184:   if (basename === 'graph-metadata.json') {
185:     return extractGraphMetadataIntents(content);
186:   }
187:   if (basename === 'description.json') {
188:     return extractDescriptionIntents(content);
189:   }
190:   return null;
191: }
192: 
193: function extractIntents(filePath: string, content: string): EdgeIntent[] {
194:   return extractMetadataIntents(filePath, content)?.intents ?? [];
195: }
196: 
197: function fieldsForFile(filePath: string): PromotedField[] {
198:   const basename = path.basename(filePath);
199:   if (basename === 'graph-metadata.json') {
200:     return ['parent_id', 'children_ids'];
201:   }
202:   if (basename === 'description.json') {
203:     return ['parentChain'];
204:   }
205:   return [];
206: }
207: 
208: function resolvePacketMemoryIds(database: Database.Database, packetIds: readonly string[]): Map<string, number> {
209:   const normalizedIds = uniqueNonEmpty(packetIds);
210:   if (normalizedIds.length === 0) {
211:     return new Map();
212:   }
213: 
214:   const placeholders = normalizedIds.map(() => '?').join(', ');
215:   const rows = database.prepare(`
216:     SELECT id, spec_folder, document_type
217:     FROM memory_index
218:     WHERE spec_folder IN (${placeholders})
219:       AND COALESCE(parent_id, 0) = 0
220:       AND COALESCE(importance_tier, 'normal') != 'deprecated'
221:     ORDER BY CASE document_type
222:       WHEN 'graph_metadata' THEN 0
223:       WHEN 'description_metadata' THEN 1
224:       WHEN 'spec' THEN 2
225:       ELSE 3
226:     END ASC, id DESC
227:   `).all(...normalizedIds) as Array<{ id: number; spec_folder: string; document_type: string | null }>;
228: 
229:   const resolved = new Map<string, number>();
230:   for (const row of rows) {
231:     const packetId = normalizePacketId(row.spec_folder);
232:     if (!resolved.has(packetId)) {
233:       resolved.set(packetId, row.id);
234:     }
235:   }
236:   return resolved;
237: }
238: 
239: function resolveIntents(database: Database.Database, sourceMemoryId: number, intents: readonly EdgeIntent[]): {
240:   resolved: ResolvedEdgeIntent[];
241:   warnings: PromotionWarning[];
242: } {
243:   const packetIds = intents.flatMap((intent) => [intent.sourcePacketId, intent.targetPacketId]);
244:   const memoryIds = resolvePacketMemoryIds(database, packetIds);
245:   const resolved: ResolvedEdgeIntent[] = [];
246:   const warnings: PromotionWarning[] = [];
247: 
248:   for (const intent of intents) {
249:     const sourceId = memoryIds.get(intent.sourcePacketId) ?? sourceMemoryId;
250:     const targetId = memoryIds.get(intent.targetPacketId);
251: 
252:     if (typeof sourceId !== 'number') {
253:       warnings.push({ field: intent.field, reference: intent.sourcePacketId, message: 'Source packet could not be resolved' });
254:       continue;
255:     }
256:     if (typeof targetId !== 'number') {
257:       warnings.push({ field: intent.field, reference: intent.targetReference, message: 'Target packet could not be resolved' });
258:       continue;
259:     }
260:     if (sourceId === targetId) {
261:       warnings.push({ field: intent.field, reference: intent.targetReference, message: 'Self-loop skipped' });
262:       continue;
263:     }
264: 
265:     resolved.push({ ...intent, sourceId, targetId });
266:   }
267: 
268:   return { resolved, warnings };
269: }
270: 
271: function edgeKey(edge: Pick<ResolvedEdgeIntent, 'sourceId' | 'targetId' | 'relation' | 'sourceAnchor' | 'targetAnchor'>): string {
272:   return [edge.sourceId, edge.targetId, edge.relation, edge.sourceAnchor, edge.targetAnchor].join('\u0000');
273: }
274: 
275: function hasManualConflict(database: Database.Database, edge: ResolvedEdgeIntent): boolean {
276:   const row = database.prepare(`
277:     SELECT id, created_by
278:     FROM causal_edges
279:     WHERE source_id = ? AND target_id = ? AND relation = ?
280:       AND COALESCE(created_by, 'manual') NOT LIKE 'auto%'
281:     LIMIT 1
282:   `).get(String(edge.sourceId), String(edge.targetId), edge.relation) as { id: number; created_by: string | null } | undefined;
283:   return Boolean(row);
284: }
285: 
286: function tableColumns(database: Database.Database, tableName: string): Set<string> {
287:   return new Set((database.prepare(`PRAGMA table_info(${tableName})`).all() as Array<{ name: string }>)
288:     .map((column) => column.name));
289: }
290: 
291: function cleanupStaleGeneratedEdges(database: Database.Database, sourceMemoryId: number, desired: readonly ResolvedEdgeIntent[], fields: readonly PromotedField[]): Pick<PromotionResult, 'staleTombstoned' | 'staleDeleted'> {
292:   const columns = tableColumns(database, 'causal_edges');
293:   if (!columns.has('extraction_method')) {
294:     return { staleTombstoned: 0, staleDeleted: 0 };
295:   }
296: 
297:   const sourceAnchors = Array.from(new Set(fields.map((field) => mappingFor(field).sourceAnchor)));
298:   if (sourceAnchors.length === 0) {
299:     return { staleTombstoned: 0, staleDeleted: 0 };
300:   }
301: 
302:   const placeholders = sourceAnchors.map(() => '?').join(', ');
303:   const rows = database.prepare(`
304:     SELECT id, source_id, target_id, relation, source_anchor, target_anchor
305:     FROM causal_edges
306:     WHERE source_id = ?
307:       AND created_by = ?
308:       AND extraction_method = ?
309:       AND source_anchor IN (${placeholders})
310:   `).all(String(sourceMemoryId), CREATED_BY, EXTRACTION_METHOD, ...sourceAnchors) as Array<{
311:     id: number;
312:     source_id: string;
313:     target_id: string;
314:     relation: string;
315:     source_anchor: string | null;
316:     target_anchor: string | null;
317:   }>;
318: 
319:   const desiredKeys = new Set(desired.map(edgeKey));
320:   const staleIds = rows
321:     .filter((row) => !desiredKeys.has([
322:       Number(row.source_id),
323:       Number(row.target_id),
324:       row.relation,
325:       row.source_anchor ?? '',
326:       row.target_anchor ?? '',
327:     ].join('\u0000')))
328:     .map((row) => row.id);
329: 
330:   if (staleIds.length === 0) {
331:     return { staleTombstoned: 0, staleDeleted: 0 };
332:   }
333: 
334:   const sweep = sweepCausalEdges(database, {
335:     edgeIds: staleIds,
336:     reason: 'metadata relationship removed',
337:     command: 'frontmatter_promoter.cleanupStaleGeneratedEdges',
338:     restoreContext: { sourceMemoryId, fields },
339:     invalidateCaches: false,
340:   });
341: 
342:   return { staleTombstoned: sweep.tombstoned, staleDeleted: sweep.deleted };
343: }
344: 
345: function promoteMetadataEdges(database: Database.Database, input: PromotionInput): PromotionResult {
346:   if (!Number.isSafeInteger(input.memoryId) || input.memoryId <= 0 || !isPromotableFile(input.filePath)) {
347:     return emptyResult();
348:   }
349: 
350:   const content = input.content ?? fs.readFileSync(input.filePath, 'utf-8');
351:   const extracted = extractMetadataIntents(input.filePath, content);
352:   const result = emptyResult();
353:   if (!extracted) {
354:     return result;
355:   }
356: 
357:   const { currentPacketId, intents } = extracted;
358:   result.processed = intents.length;
359: 
360:   causalEdges.init(database);
361: 
362:   const canonicalSourceId = resolvePacketMemoryIds(database, [currentPacketId]).get(normalizePacketId(currentPacketId)) ?? input.memoryId;
363: 
364:   const { resolved, warnings } = resolveIntents(database, canonicalSourceId, intents);
365:   result.warnings.push(...warnings);
366:   result.resolved = resolved.length;
367: 
368:   const fields = fieldsForFile(input.filePath);
369:   const cleanup = cleanupStaleGeneratedEdges(database, canonicalSourceId, resolved, fields);
370:   result.staleTombstoned += cleanup.staleTombstoned;
371:   result.staleDeleted += cleanup.staleDeleted;
372: 
373:   const seen = new Set<string>();
374:   for (const edge of resolved) {
375:     const key = edgeKey(edge);
376:     if (seen.has(key)) {
377:       continue;
378:     }
379:     seen.add(key);
380: 
381:     if (hasManualConflict(database, edge)) {
382:       result.skippedManual++;
383:       continue;
384:     }
385: 
386:     const edgeId = causalEdges.insertEdge(
387:       String(edge.sourceId),
388:       String(edge.targetId),
389:       edge.relation,
390:       1.0,
391:       `Metadata relationship: ${edge.field}`,
392:       false,
393:       CREATED_BY,
394:       {
395:         sourceAnchor: edge.sourceAnchor,
396:         targetAnchor: edge.targetAnchor,
397:       },
398:       {
399:         confidence: CONFIDENCE,
400:         extractionMethod: EXTRACTION_METHOD,
401:       },
402:     );
403:     if (edgeId !== null) {
404:       result.inserted++;
405:     }
406:   }
407: 
408:   return result;
409: }
410: 
411: export {
412:   CONFIDENCE as FRONTMATTER_PROMOTER_CONFIDENCE,
413:   EXTRACTION_METHOD as FRONTMATTER_PROMOTER_EXTRACTION_METHOD,
414:   RELATION_MAPPINGS as FRONTMATTER_RELATION_MAPPINGS,
415:   extractIntents as extractFrontmatterEdgeIntents,
416:   promoteMetadataEdges,
417: };
418: 
419: export type {
420:   EdgeIntent as FrontmatterEdgeIntent,
421:   PromotionInput as FrontmatterPromotionInput,
422:   PromotionResult as FrontmatterPromotionResult,
423: };
